meta.title: The Health Care Excise Tax: A Bipartisan Discussion
meta.description: A conference on the issues raised by the ACA's excise tax  with Tevi Troy, Bill Samuel, Paul Howard, Paul Van de  Water, and Rep. Rob Andrews - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
